title: BlackBerry Q4 revenue rises 10%, gives FY27 outlook
text: BlackBerry reported strong Q4 FY2026 results with revenue of $156.0 million, up 10% year-over-year. The company returned to growth after years of decline. Full fiscal year 2026 revenue reached $549.1 million, up 3% year-over-year. For fiscal 2027, BlackBerry projects total revenue between $584 million and $611 million. QNX revenue is expected to reach $290-$307 million, while Secure Communications should generate $270-$280 million. Adjusted EBITDA is forecasted at $110-$130 million, with operating cash flow approaching $100 million. The company achieved eight consecutive quarters of profitability improvement. QNX delivered record Q4 revenue of $78.7 million, up 20% year-over-year, with a $950 million royalty backlog. Secure Communications revenue grew 8% year-over-year to $72.5 million, driven by digital sovereignty tailwinds and defense demand. BlackBerry ended the period with $432.4 million in total cash and investments.
